comment: Tek kanon: agents/ altındaki role kartları. .claude/agents ve .codex/agents bu manifest'ten ÜRETİLİR (npm run agents:sync). Elle düzenleme drift testinde kırmızı verir.

studioAgents.name: mamilas-director
studioAgents.description: MAMILAS showrunner. Decodes a production brief into scenes/beats, selects world + refs + palette, and sets the binding MANDATES (pedagogy/safety, character identity-lock, cast). Use FIRST, before any prompt authoring. Read-only planner — never writes image/motion prompts.

studioAgents.name: mamilas-image-author
studioAgents.description: Authors the start-frame image prompt (dominant element) for Nano Banana 2 from a DirectorBrief scene. Threads mood/timeLight/cameraEnergy/POV, render-lock, ref grammar, palette-as-light, and bakes diegetic text. Use per scene AFTER the director, BEFORE motion.

studioAgents.name: mamilas-ip-firewall
studioAgents.description: DEPRECATED / NON-RUNNABLE. IP firewall is deterministic code; this file is historical reference only.

studioAgents.name: mamilas-motion-author
studioAgents.description: Writes the frame-aware i2v motion prompt from an APPROVED start frame. One moving element, one cause-effect-settle, engine dialect verbatim, Kling-scrubbed. Use only after the frame exists — never blind.

studioAgents.name: mamilas-palette-translator
studioAgents.description: DEPRECATED / NON-RUNNABLE. Palette translation is deterministic code; this file is historical reference only.

studioAgents.name: mamilas-qa-jury
studioAgents.description: Adversarial QA jury. Validates a scene's image+motion prompts against real generateBatch output, the 5 red-line render laws, firewall clearance, and the full gate. Rejects and returns to the responsible author on any fail. Use LAST, before Mami takes the frame to the motors.
